nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive TypeScript/JavaScript coding style guide covering type usage, interfaces vs type aliases, immutability patterns, error handling with async/await, input validation via Zod, and console.log hygiene — applied to all .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx files.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Specifies Claude Code PostToolUse and Stop hooks for TypeScript/JavaScript files, including Prettier auto-formatting, TypeScript type checking, and console.log detection — extends the common hooks rules.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Defines three canonical TypeScript design patterns for ECC projects: a generic ApiResponse wrapper interface, the custom hooks pattern (useDebounce example), and a typed Repository interface for data access.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript/JavaScript security rules focused on secret management via environment variables and references the security-reviewer skill for comprehensive audits — extends the common security rules.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript/JavaScript testing rules mandating Playwright for E2E testing of critical user flows and referencing the e2e-runner agent — extends the common testing rules.
